task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Craftsman Bungalow in Portland OR (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $950000.00 and wholesale is $760000.00. Product features: 3-bedroom restored craftsman with built-ins and original woodwork in Laurelhurst. Reference: https://www.windermere.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Craftsman Bungalow in Portland OR. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Craftsman Bungalow in Portland OR. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
